hb8ad981dg81ddg4412g81degd8520eec93bd: I greet you, child of the stars. How has your search for the mushrooms fared?
h16b57e6ag73ddg4a51gaf7cg93fc9ad7d784: I greet you, child of the dark. How has your search for the mushrooms fared?
he79f7821ga9b0g4009g8650g04eb032fc5c3: I greet you, child of the sun. How has your search for the mushrooms fared?
ha04f042cg99f6g4c09ga0f1gcfa2f959426b: You return. Have you changed your mind about the ring?
h937c155egbde0g40cdg840bg05153ca0cc07: I greet you, friend of the dark.
hf36749a7gfa46g42b6gad63g176b30eea124: I greet you, child of the stars.
h4b501181g9147g4deagb4b7g8caa38bf8f2d: How could a ghaik ever leave its colony?
h40b8d3bbg6240g4fe8g855eg689cb60a53a8: How did you escape your colony?
ha914ad20ge3f5g4a0dg9ef8g2245d8deaad8: I was born with a propensity for arcane magic my people despise. It gave me the strength to resist the elder brain.
h6e594d76g940dg4ffbgac90gd98848d820e0: Every waking hour, I pushed back against its dire hold. My wizardry empowered me.
h909d1655gad3fg49a7g82e3g8186a674681b: The moment its control shattered, I fled before the colony discovered I had defected.
hfbbbce55gc39cg4415gbff8g22ee93a98715: Are you so keen to know my pain, young gith?
h0911ee0cgd713g4e8fg895fg179a5b688265: That is not a story I share with strangers.
hd3691799g2083g42d3gbd8fg7535aab53865: How do you survive? Your kind must feast on sentient minds.
h46a71839g8106g4171gb9b0ge28906abb69e: How do you survive? Don't you need... brains?
h943a064dg5780g40b6gb567g05097a8c339d: In the beginning, I had an arrangement with a lich. Excellent company, despite what one would expect.
hb752a98bgf4d9g4b81g912cg56a41c707f3c: I required brains, he required souls. A perfect symbiosis.
h6acded35g8935g406bgab59g3da06013899b: But our ambitions eventually splintered. I wished to better the world, and he preferred its rot.
he7796149g82e3g4592gbd1dg22a1a2690a3d: So I left his company, and thus I now feed from those who... act against the Society's goals.
ha7548449gecccg4b16g800bg3d5162962a67: Best way to deal with that sort of hunger, I suppose.
h6ac6532bgc91ag48dagaee4gbf685768d839: Perhaps the peoples of the Underdark will be less inclined to violence if they comprehend the cost, yes?
h9b5132d1g70cfg45fega75eg360b407b114a: I cannot change my appetites. Although I am experimenting in reducing them with magic.
h288c4832g555eg4e0ag99a7g39de4708f05a: Perhaps with time, it can be one brain a year instead of one a month...
hed593ad2g3b2cg4c1bg80a4g93ec992cafe8: I'd like to learn more about the tadpole.
h1b55f492g6dc1g4c57gaf60g16164c310540: *An almost childlike joy enters Omeluum's ichor-laced eyes.*
h0ae2678cgae8bg4592gb631gd967e0baedfd: Open your mind to me, friend. Let us see what lurks within.
he56ede30gce2cg4879g850fg9902a4cffb29: Swallow your disgust and permit the ghaik's search.
h3b4328cbgff99g46a1gb974g080d68d8e23d: *As Omeluum's mind pierces yours, the tadpole pulses with power.*
h12dc46a9gbb48g48eag8f85g16bb1871c6b1: *It feels ten times its size. Alive, awake. Almost smug.*
h1bfea92agbdf6g4f16ga1a1g069f01495002: This is most unusual. The incubation period should be complete, as should your transformation.
h502e2932g123fg43cfg8f8bg3f4dc55362ee: But the larva is infused with strange magic. It appears to be in some form of stasis.
hb82a84b7g69bfg4e93gb053g73fa3f6528b3: No. It appears to be shielded from physical and magical influence.
hdb32c1eag5a61g44b0gadaag8166a54ae56b: And even without the shield, the extraction would involve severe cranial trauma.
hf733d433gb447g4e25g8b6ag86bd766aabeb: It is not ideal. The process would surely kill you.
hda1ab1ffg3f82g4b59gad45gc0d2e020f03a: But not to worry. Should you transform, I will happily perform a new examination.
h7693393bg355fg42f4g97a5gd6f0f26ac002: Tell Omeluum about the strange mind flayer ship you were on.
hfe0ba830gb292g444cg8fe8gd8a7aaee0161: A nautiloid? Fascinating. I have never set foot on one myself.
h8d4aafd3gae08g45bbgb596g3549fdbba7bd: They were our warships during the greatest eras of the illithid empire. We ruled the entire Astral Plane from their decks.
h66d0ddf8g0a87g4a74g9594g417d93e77971: The design was lost when the gith rebelled and ended our dominion.
h713bee5dg910bg4b73gb0ccg0451c2476d01: Of course. I am sorry I cannot assist you in its removal.
h119fb5b6gd970g4161gb69bg78088847a84d: Oh? Perhaps I should start taking notes.
hfde7edbdgc71dg458agb9baga8adfe014bda: There may be a way to bypass that stasis. There are many alchemical substances that can influence the mind.
he1ca4f56g2e1bg45d3g9557gd56cf828c69b: Bypass? What kind of alchemy are we talking about?
h6629227cg6027g4b47g9bb0gad6e42bf3af0: A tincture distilled from a collection of rare mushrooms. They have subtle psionic influence.
h568c77e3g7239g4a6egb621g4819e19c3054: I would require a fresh Tongue of Madness and Timmask spores.
hd2198497gbf99g48cfgab48g149365634123: But be warned. In their natural state, both of these mushrooms can be quite dangerous.
he9b154cfg1937g40d4ga68eg9eeeb0738ecb: Timmasks cause confusion in those that approach them. The Tongue is... self-explanatory.
h0fa3f3dbg1e40g404egaa49g79f318a9c63c: Eating those doesn't sound like a great idea.
he7ce0899ge6f4g486fg8a7cg62e70235e699: My formula will hamper the more harmful effects once the mushrooms are brewed into a potion.
h76a5e226g6cfag4662g9f9cg1cb0ee4a09d1: Your sanity, however much you possess, should remain intact.
h6f3695cdg0806g426aga512g3f7016b13371: Lovely. So where do I find these mushrooms?
hfddfa196g5802g404cg98ceg2d6a47c70c1b: The Underdark, of course. Although they are quite rare, and their discovery... perilous.
h53398e56gcc2dg41bfga01egd7903a9d22e4: Hm. I imagine Lenore would have them in her possession. She served Mystra as a cleric.
hd69c2e24g4dc7g4404g865bg2acd513543e3: Why would a cleric have a bunch of dangerous mushrooms?
h9e156ec6gbd9dg4a34g8d19g1fd26329c572: She is quite fond of her garden. Lenore has always been a lonely sort - nature was her only companion.
h67de1803g74bcg40a3gba41gcfae3c1709e8: I offered her the chance to join the Society, but she refused. Her experiments on Sussur Bark took priority.
h0499a3cdg26bag4b12gb247ge62b1a82cfb4: The southwest, when I last saw her. Although her tower does have a tendency... to move.
hdd8077bcgaf99g40d1g882cge6e4429f0625: Good to know. I have other priorities right now.
h5222ab77ge0b2g4660g8992gdcdfc977ae68: May your travels be safe and swift.
hd9cbab73g8542g4a6agae4fg343052ef4fe0: In nature, of course. But I imagine the nearby cleric's tower may also grow them.
he108547egb592g4921g8656g805d2195ee79: The occupant was obsessed with magical plants. Sussur bark and the like. But no matter their source, I will take the mushrooms.
h4d592e87g355eg47e2g83f8g7f0b032b30e0: That's too risky of an experiment for me. Count me out.
h19a68de8g76bfg470fgae65gf8bfc7ec0f57: All right. I'll come back when I find the mushrooms.
h23d6d8fdgd2eeg4d48gb163g5d164431674f: I think I already have what you're looking for.
h1e043a6eg779eg4a8dga29bg6f5cb7c8b902: Isn't the stasis why the tadpole hasn't killed me yet?
h4d1a7632g408dg46e2gb2ffg3e6fa4bcbd07: I do not intend to shatter its protection.
h4a825559g3bfdg4dc2g83ccg6ee3de21c612: I need only bypass the interference that prevents me from communicating with the larva.
h439305b7gf3c0g4832gb7efgafcc13ce9d91: No, I'm done with all this.
hd3d5becaga182g47acg95c5g5bc119146654: Understandable. If you change your mind in the future, say as such. I will perform the experiment then.
h9ac27429g04feg447bgbb11g8ab7d1311e4a: All that probing was useless in the end.
h9f63bed2gcddag4f81g85d3g6000ab10b321: My apologies. I hope the experience was not too unpleasant.
ha5a7c0a7ge523g47adgb4cega996e912c8de: What happens if that stasis goes away?
hf110e9f3g2f51g42b8g8907g41b6b13df204: I can only theorise, but I suspect your transformation would be both agonising and instantaneous.
hbb9b963eg1632g43b2g842cg5f97253bf398: I thought it was always agonising, Omeluum.
h90134c6cg52c1g4a63gb3b7g637e45414e27: Well, yes, but that wasn't my point.
ha47c7b83g1f3ag4a65g982eg632bcd20c30e: Don't waste my time. Say what you mean.
he3f6231ag2aadg409ag9f01g1069567f7b53: Ahem. Death. It means you would have to die first to extract the tadpole.
h1c891037g9f47g499fg9266gfda0789a4543: Extracting the larva would kill you. Immediately.
hef4f7585g7cefg4351gbf8bg7850dca69291: Bashing my skull is just part of a day's work.
hca192592g3c2fg4a1cg93ffg40412437d488: You would not survive the outcome. The tadpole must be completely crushed, and your skull along with it.
h8dd9e18ag7337g47cbga9cag3184b737c62e: How severe? I have healing magic.
h2c32454bg440dg4d71ga4b9ge4358f5039ad: How severe? I have healing magic.
h67e07e19gc8bdg479agb872g271a3c8c9f79: I intend no disrespect, but one can only heal so much of their own brain tissue.
hff7cc1ebgd0b8g44e0gabe3gc9566c731950: Relax and allow Omeluum's mind to search yours.
h2b19249dg0010g41edga699g33386c98469a: Never mind. I'm done with mind flayers touching me.
h29dafcc3ga9f0g4505g9f09gc518e7d24053: I see. I will remain here if you decide otherwise.
h8d8249c8g7bb4g42beg8595g1f842cd6d02a: I changed my mind. What do you need to experiment on the tadpole?
hd84610d7g60ddg40aag8febg8cc7cba3e888: Refresh my memory - what do you need for the potion?
h14821439g9491g45eegb306g96212fa3a2e2: A Tongue of Madness and the spores from a Timmask mushroom.
h795396eegfb43g4602gac43gdc52a48aa4ae: You may find them in nature, or the nearby cleric's tower. Be cautious - those that have taken root are quite dangerous.
h2ab2c988g32a8g42cdgbf65ga6ce88c0f6fb: I found those mushrooms you were looking for.
h8738671age3ccg4187g8e3dgd59b633d1377: These are fine specimens. It will only take me a moment to brew them to proper potency.
h81eff086g1d8eg4bafg9debgeb65c95679b7: *Omeluum turns away to prepare the potion, lost in its own musings.*
h7282e2aagaf85g4bd2g926ag9a6217976e3f: You must drink the entire draught. I can make no promises as to its taste.
h260f038dgd89fg4830gb2cbgbed98ac3a3e5: *The potion is disgusting beyond description. The only mercy is that it goes down quickly.*
h55f96064g44b2g4c9dg8f2agc5cb1d39b2f6: As the potion influences your mind, you may find yourself acting irrationally. Try and stay focused.
h3a32b336g20d1g49f8g839fgf093b7551846: *The world loses its edges, its finer boundaries. You are fluid but trapped, like a creature suspended in amber.*
h737a1ebdgf3b3g4c11gba79g808377770b4a: *Drawing on a lifetime of practice, you centre yourself. Your body is an anchor, implacable and calm.*
h97ecb719g63b1g4d10g995eg8cba8f6ec64b: *The tadpole spasms, seizes. It's fighting the potion even harder than you are.*
h579cb34cg9434g4f03g8828g6b0285d45eb7: *Fear pierces your mind like knives of ice. The parasite digs deeper, as if it means to hollow out your skull.*
h2d9d8951g1de7g49e9g8195gf23c62b39948: *The cold blades lose their edge. You are stalwart, turning that tide of fear against itself.*
h38487b5dg080dg47dbg81d5g17c5e3f64837: *The parasite swells with power - more power than you have ever felt before.*
h138c3328gb1c0g43a5g9f2fgb5db77b0d056: *It surges and twists, lashing out against that which would dare to intrude.*
hf586f7fcg039ag4884g8b77g887e6ac821dd: *The parasite in your mind quiets, pleased with itself.*
h4f4ee7d6g8cc8g4d33gb6f6ge94e21d07fa6: That larva is like nothing I have ever observed before. Its power is... unsettling.
h2a1bd288g577bg414fgb3dfg649f7c6fc604: I felt it grow inside me. There's more power than ever.
h3fdb5c24g3082g4c65gbfa0ga095f65a354c: Such an outcome was not in my calculations. There is more to this being than mere stasis.
hfeff2102gc5fag4002g9512g0a1a64dd876c: So I went through all this and the tadpole's still lodged in my brain?
hb7bb4aa4gaa58g462ega986gdf226fbea54e: Indeed. Although I may have another solution, albeit a temporary one.
h75fb0802g46b2g4808ga651g050bdc69c3b7: I possess a ring of mind shielding. It prevents Elder Brains from noticing my presence.
h530dcd6bg0811g428dgaeecg9f7d7bfe6cb2: It will not remove the larva, but it will limit its influence, both positive and negative.
h24ee837dgd911g490ega8e7gf6032976fc38: I would offer it as a gift, but in truth, the ring is priceless. Is there anything you could offer me in turn?
h2a674623gdedeg43bcgad23g54602c5c8eb2: Why didn't you mention the ring before this potion debacle?
h104f82b1gbe00g4682ga8daga1d2065672fa: And I must admit, I was curious to study the tadpole myself.
h87bb4700g17f6g4f9agb1cdgc1e291e6192c: I have gold. Will that suit?
h8f89458fge315g4989g809egd122011e220a: My research is in perpetual need of funding. Yes, I am willing to accept your coin.
hfff8505dg78a6g419aga147g40dec59f2fa4: If you wish to acquire the ring later, you need only ask.
h8319e887g1315g4cf8g9e2fg58fb51488484: May it serve you as well as it has served me.
h6f8b9175gc44bg4563gb239g44913b6a2f41: To deal with this abomination? Nigh unthinkable. Yet even Vlaakith herself could not deny the ring's merit.
hd4593497gd004g41bdg9f7bg3bb98444078f: Of course, the larva remains. Be ever-vigilant of its growth.
hb31178cdg291bg441fg8ab1gc9ec4a0287f2: That thing better work. If it doesn't, I doubt you'll be in any position to complain...
h36d3ac6dg252ag4742gab61gc836925b28ca: A pretty thing. And at least it offers us some protection from the tadpole.
h74caf2f3g2dfeg453fg9a96gdfa62d8d32ef: The squiddie gives me jitters. But that ring's worth every last one.
h00b0fbdagf123g45f5g90b2g3e0147982e16: That could mean any number of things.
h54090e89g2169g4027gaa11gd8453b404007: No, I want this power. Keep your ring.
h0a3a33e5g2183g424fgb9ecgefdb1bb62f91: A bold strategy. It is not many that can defeat their own minds.
hbf9413cfgc920g47d1ga373gff218e562b75: If you require it on another occasion, merely ask.
hfc6d4a92g3adfg45d0gacb4g733bc8f102cd: How about I tell you more about that nautiloid? Every last detail.
h2bd82af8g7819g4e0cgb75cg20eeab6acf95: A fascinating topic indeed. What can you tell me?
h9d46b528gbe76g477fga0d3g794647c9d4b6: Give a dramatic retelling of your time on the mind flayer ship.
haec0020egda4eg4984gaefcg1e596a194741: What a brilliant experience. To feel one step closer to my ancestors is a fine gift indeed.
hd438a3e6g7c3eg45c1gab06gbaa41cae913d: Hm. I am afraid you have not offered any information I do not already possess.
h10057fd3g4b62g4188gbf76gcede2ec6bde2: Offer a detailed, logical analysis of the nautiloid.
hdf048bb2g4c03g482cg8712g5b09a76f8527: Never mind. I'm not in the mood for sharing.
ha2d1e636g01adg4be5gb076g75b8a4450175: Your people enslaved mine. The debt is yours to repay.
ha4b5ec8dge785g412ega146gc3440d2fdc6d: That... is true. And I cannot imagine many other mind flayers will offer restitution.
hc3acb65eg32b9g43eeg92d0gdbedd17c8647: Except... it does not seem to be on my person. Did I leave it on that last expedition somewhere? Hm.
hce95e388ga0adg43bdga7a6g169e142dc567: My apologies. I cannot trade what I do not possess.
hb19bb5c6g9f14g4177g9b0cgc6227d13c113: I enslaved no one, and stand against such practice. I cannot surrender my own shield for nothing.
h75f14553g5aabg4bd7g8862g26fe767d8052: I wouldn't be in this situation if it wasn't for a mind flayer. You owe me.
ha8f797bbg4a9fg4af3g9897g2f7ee254fc87: Your conflict is with one I have never met. This ring protects me. I cannot surrender it for free.
h6b88017dg546ag451fgba31g6c07357395cc: Either give me the ring, or I'll run you through.
h8df3e7d1gf572g41a2gbcb7g7604a6121ff5: We shouldn't cause trouble, Omeluum. There are enough threats down here in the Underdark.
hda34e6a4gbdb7g42bdga74fg10350dd08cf1: Very well. I abhor violence, and would rather prevent it where possible.
h9666c21bgf7e1g4e6ag8d5fge7543f22ab73: I understand the potion has put you in a... precarious condition. But I will not respond to such threats.
h380af7d6gacd0g4a03ga89dg9beb509adffb: What's next? Cutting off my own head?
hd13f3e40gfbc2g4f60gbb6fg728f65e3d8b6: Such crude destruction may not waylay a larva like this. But there is another possibility.
h7047d3c1gdd72g4880gbe35gd9174473e0f9: I suppose it's not all bad. More power is better than less.
h4251681dg853eg4ec0g8288g11e10590bea9: Yet that power may grow beyond your control. I have another intermediate solution, if you are in need.
h9ab1f095gb990g44eeg8001gad9a49a9b130: That potion of yours could have killed me. The tadpole almost did the same.
h424f97c4g235eg4f1dgabb5g31531b3ce803: It holds far more power than it should. For the larva to react to my manipulations in such a way is beyond my ken.
hbf54883fga942g43aeg9abagb4d4c0ad7289: You were supposed to make it weaker, not stronger!
h6fda2dd8g5843g4889g8c68g086362cd5dfb: You have my deepest apologies. The larva did not care for my intentions.
h76d23886g26fag4407gb73fgdfa249aa3df8: *A wave of psychic force batters your mind, cruel and calculating. You are nothing to it. You are small.*
h139faaa1g1ea9g4ce4gbdeeg68b76f72f386: Wall off your mind from the psionic seizure.
h29beefdbgebb1g4108ga4cbg807e0e4354c8: *Dark holes bite at the edges of your vision, but the void cannot draw you in.*
h56482391gccc5g4045g93bbgd4a455252eff: *You're sinking - sinking into a starless void that has no end. The connection between mind and body draws thin and tight.*
h5ae90970g7d88g4b27g9485g190054835270: Focus on the present, not the illusions.
hd2ff6a0dg4126g48dag9c0dg00198e5f5ef4: *A few sparks and colors dance around Omeluum, but you stay steady and staring ahead.*
h25ecad21gfc3eg41f6gba75gefeafb8b16c6: *The acidic liquid tightens your throat, burning on the way down. It's a bolt of agony straight to your stomach.*
h186de2ccgb423g458ag8ecfg7c75af91d6f2: What exactly is this going to do to me?
hd66c6cb1g82dag40e1gb756gefb41509c63c: It will lower the psionic defences around the larva. If I cannot remove it, I may still be able to tell you more about its origin.
h09002f65g06c2g4855g84e2g7f183345140a: *Omeluum watches you with cautious intensity. It expects doubt. It expects fear.*
h869b3433g4fe5g41c6gb578gdf33c0fec5aa: What aren't you telling me? Is this experiment dangerous?
h8a4b7f73g0f39g4f8cg867bg69d6fd653022: Only in that you may be a danger to yourself. What the potion may make you see or feel - I cannot determine.
h4a44d6b0g4d10g4a14gad66g8250895f1968: But unless you are already a step from death, it will not kill you.
h7557afefg22e2g4c24g840fgaa15f6b4e89b: I need some time to prepare.
h32cf71b0g7e10g4a30g9fe6g9d69e5b17c06: Of course. Return when you are ready.
h9f399a06g720eg4e07g9fcdga96919517b75: Take a look at those mushrooms yet?
h22825f34g8b33g4e49ga6f6gc79a88f96da0: Do you still have that potion? I'm ready.
hb101b0ebg903fg4802gbe7ege43dc498826d: Yes. Although it may be a touch cold by now.
h369dba7dg1922g4b8cg8deeg6b0f5e46ee28: I want that ring to protect my mind.
h9fe5d3f9gd260g4900g807cg481827c57657: Is this enough gold for it?
h8f196762ga4d9g42d9gbd45g729e251959ed: There's no trusting a mind flayer. Attack.
hbf3befe9ga2f1g443bg99feg573f8254ed82: I will not reward your hostility. Begone!
